description.value:
You defined self-perfection and will lets no other voices influence you. Your control over your mind is resolute, allowing you to shake off the worst effects your foes impart.

Whenever you attempt a saving throw against an ability that would impart the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Confused] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Controlled] condition you roll twice and take the better result; this is a fortune effect.

If you have the confused or controlled condition, you can attempt a Will save to end the effect at the start of each of your turns.
